Education

Framework & Tools: GitHub, React, VsCode

Work Expiriences

Royal Bank of Canada
Leadership Development Intern
Jan 2026 - Present

  • Partnered with management to ensure effectiveness of the branch
  • Adressed local community needs through management practices
  • Ensured high employee engagement through talent management, development, and career planning

Smartrend Manufacturing Group
Network Support Co-op Analyst
Jan 2025 - Sep 2025
